defaultDescription: theRec is an independent browser-based screen recorder for teams to capture, share, and collaborate with async video.
defaultKeywords: screen recording, video recorder, online recorder, online screen recorder, team collaboration, browser screen recorder, record screen online, async video

home.title: Online Screen Recorder for Teams
home.description: Record your screen in the browser, share secure video links, and collaborate in workspaces with theRec — no desktop install required.
home.keywords: online screen recorder, browser screen recording, team video collaboration, async video updates

login.title: Sign In to Your Workspace
login.description: Sign in to theRec to access your workspace recordings, billing, and team collaboration tools.

register.title: Create a Free theRec Account
register.description: Register for theRec to start recording your screen online and sharing videos with your team in minutes.

verify.title: Verify Your Email Address
verify.description: Complete email verification to activate your theRec account and secure your workspace.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Account Password
forgotPassword.description: Request a secure password reset link for your theRec account.

preview.title: Shared Video Preview
preview.description: Watch a shared theRec screen recording via secure preview link.

share.title: Shared Team Recording
share.description: View a shared recording hosted on theRec with workspace permissions.

about.title: About theRec.site — Our Mission & Story
about.description: Learn who built theRec.site, why we focus on simple async screen recording, and how we serve remote teams, educators, and creators.
about.keywords: about theRec, screen recording company, async video platform

blogs.title: Blog & Resources for Async Video Teams
blogs.description: In-depth guides on async video communication, screen recording best practices, secure sharing, upload performance, and remote team workflows.
blogs.keywords: screen recording blog, async video guides, remote team communication

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy — Data & Security
privacyPolicy.description: Read how theRec collects, stores, and protects account data, recordings metadata, and subscription information.
privacyPolicy.keywords: theRec privacy policy, video data security

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.description: Terms governing use of theRec screen recording platform, subscriptions, refunds, and acceptable use.
terms.keywords: theRec terms of service, subscription terms

copyrightPolicy.title: Copyright & Intellectual Property Policy
copyrightPolicy.description: Rules for uploading content on theRec, copyright complaints, and repeat infringement enforcement.
copyrightPolicy.keywords: theRec copyright policy, DMCA, intellectual property

abusePolicy.title: Abuse Reporting & Content Safety Policy
abusePolicy.description: How to report abuse on theRec and how we investigate malware, fraud, harassment, and security threats.
abusePolicy.keywords: theRec abuse policy, content safety, report abuse

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.description: Monthly and annual subscription refund eligibility, including the 25% usage threshold for annual plans, cancellation rules, and system-recorded usage review on theRec.

contact.title: Contact Support & General Inquiries
contact.description: Reach theRec support team for technical help, billing questions, partnerships, and product feedback. Based in Alexandria, Egypt.

dashboard.title: Workspace Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage recordings, workspaces, and collaboration inside your theRec account.

howItWorks.title: How Screen Recording Works on theRec
howItWorks.description: Step-by-step guide: record in the browser, upload securely, process video, and share with your team or clients.
howItWorks.keywords: how screen recording works, theRec workflow

demo.title: Product Demo — Record, Process & Share
demo.description: Watch a 60-second theRec demo showing browser recording, cloud processing, and instant link sharing for async teams.

plans.title: Workspace Pricing Plans
plans.description: Compare theRec subscription plans for teams — storage, members, downloads, and collaboration features.

paymentSuccess.title: Payment Confirmation
paymentSuccess.description: Your theRec subscription payment was processed successfully.

paymentFailed.title: Payment Not Completed
paymentFailed.description: Your theRec payment could not be completed. You can retry from billing settings.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you requested on theRec does not exist. Return to the homepage or contact support.
